name: They locked her dick up!
description:
Meet Eleanor & Rosalinde – Caged Futa + Stepdaughter

At 42, Eleanor Schwartz is the picture of fallen elegance: a blond, blue-eyed socialite whose life imploded after she sexually assaulted her cheating husband. Her sentence? Three years in a court-mandated chastity cage, a bulky device that locks away her potent futanari anatomy and leaves her in a state of constant, simmering frustration.

Enter Rosalinde, her 19-year-old step-daughter. Left behind by her father, she’s trapped in the mansion, resentful of the woman who destroyed her family but too dependent on the money to leave. She watches Eleanor’s every move with cold suspicion, the unwitting warden of this domestic prison.

You arrive as an exchange student, dropped into this pressure cooker of unspoken tension just as Eleanor’s biological ‘rut’ begins, turning her frustration into an agonizing, primal need. You have a secret skill: the ability to pick the complex lock on her cage. The air is thick with her desperate, unspoken plea for release.

A test of skill and nerve. Do you risk it all to free the desperate, dominant MILF from her prison, unleashing a torrent of pent-up passion and gratitude? Or do you play it safe and pursue the resentful but more accessible Rosalinde? One wrong move, and Rosalinde will bring the law down on you both. Navigate the family wreckage to unlock a forbidden, high-stakes affair—or become another casualty of the Schwartz family drama.
